steps.title: Read the slope of line k
steps.content: The equation $y=-\frac{17}{3}x+5$ is already in slope-intercept form, $y=mx+b$. The slope is the coefficient of $x$, so line $k$ has slope $-\frac{17}{3}$.

steps.title: Use the perpendicular shortcut
steps.content:
Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals. Flip $-\frac{17}{3}$ to $-\frac{3}{17}$, then change the sign:
$$m_j=\frac{3}{17}$$

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: The slope of line $j$ is $\frac{3}{17}$, so .1764 is a correct decimal entry.
